'''Enjikket''' was a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] of [[Nebit/Legends|Nebit's]] tribe. A scouting mission for [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] in the [[Jundland Wastes/Legends|Jundland Wastes]] was his and his brother [[Yeelhoy]]'s first hunt. He was the youngest member of the scouting party, and a nephew of scout leader [[Dathcha/Legends|Dathcha]].

==Appearances==
*{{Film|IV}} {{1st}}
